_doc: RAG eval annotation set. Each entry: id / query / relevant_chunk_ids / notes. Run scripts/eval-rag.mjs --seed-template to print BM25+ANN candidates per query for hand-labeling relevant_chunk_ids.
_provenance: Queries are drawn from chat_tasks history of user 5dcad5a2-... (zhousiyao03@gmail.com) Apr 9 -- May 1 2026. Distribution intentionally over-weights recency queries (q-001..q-008) because that is the user's dominant real-world failure mode (asking 'what did I do recently' but RAG retrieves old chunks). relevant_chunk_ids are taken from the user's actual notes (knowledge_chunks table on Turso prod) as of 2026-05-03; if chunks are re-indexed, the ids will go stale and need a fresh --seed-template pass.

queries.notes: User asked this 3+ times in real history. Should retrieve last few diary entries (5/3, 5/2, 5/1, 4/29, 4/28). Classic recency failure: RAG often returns ancient diaries instead.
Asked 13 times in real history (scope=notes). Highest-frequency unsatisfied query. Should retrieve last few days' diaries + most recent topical notes (RAG, openclaw vs hermes).

queries.query: 看看我今天的日记写的啥
queries.notes: Today=2026-05-03. Single chunk: '想到公司的破事就烦，但学习 AI 就很舒服...'. RAG must understand 'today' = 5/3 from query context, not blindly do semantic search.

Asked once in real history. Wants synthesis across diaries (interests, habits) + life-snapshot notes (career planning, asset position). No single chunk is the right answer; recall set is broad-but-personal.
Same family as q-004; phrased differently. Want diaries + career-reflection chunks.
Asked 2 times. Variant of q-001. Should also include '五一开始了' note (4/29) because it sets up what 'recent' means.
Asked 2 times. Tests whether retriever maps '日子' to 'diary entries'.
Asked 4 times. 'Newest' interpretation: chronological top-N regardless of topic. Should include 5/3 diary, 5/2 GitHub trending, 5/2 RAG note, 5/2 diary.

queries.query: 我最近写过什么关于 RAG 的笔记
queries.notes: Asked once. Hybrid query: topic (RAG) + recency. Both '一文搞懂 RAG（一）/ （二）' notes are dated 5/2.

queries.query: 规划一下我的职业发展
queries.notes: Asked 5+ times. Pure topic recall. Direct hit: '新加坡DA职业发展规划_AI方向必要性_横纵分析报告'.

queries.query: 对比一下主流编程语言
queries.notes: Synthetic but realistic — user has a deep '主流编程语言_横纵分析报告' note dated 4/29. Tests topical recall on a single hot note.

queries.query: openclaw 和 hermes agent 的架构区别
queries.notes: Synthetic but well-grounded — 'openclaw vs hermes-agent — 架构对比笔记' (5/2) is the literal answer. Tests whether semantic search beats keyword (query phrasing differs slightly).
Synthetic but real — 'Knosi 项目完整讲稿' (5/3 03:41) is the only note that matches. Single-doc hit; recall@10 should easily score 1.0 here. Floor case.

queries.query: Redis ZSet 为什么用跳表
queries.notes: Synthetic. User wrote '跳表 (Skip List) — Redis ZSet 为什么用它' on 4/27. Pure keyword + semantic hit. Floor case.

queries.query: 布隆过滤器误判率怎么算
queries.notes: Synthetic. User has dedicated '布隆过滤器原理 + 误判率 + 工程应用' note (4/27). Direct topic hit.
Tests whether retriever can match a date in the title. Single direct match: 'GitHub 热门 · 2026-05-01'.
Single hit: '5月份 TODO'. Floor case.

queries.query: 我笔记里写过用 Rust 实现什么具体的项目吗
queries.notes: Negative case: user has notes ABOUT Rust as a language (in 主流编程语言 report) but no notes about a specific Rust project they implemented. Empty relevant_chunk_ids means the query has no good answer; harness skips scoring this — it remains as documentation that this kind of negative case exists.
